{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Queen Shyrax's royal guard
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The narrator served as an advisor to [[Queen Shyrax's royal guard]] during their fifth [[life]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c6">''The Captain'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
